name: Dundee Sustainable Technologies Inc.
description: Dundee Sustainable Technologies Inc. is a Canada-based company engaged in the development and commercialization of environment-friendly technologies for the treatment of materials in the mining industry. The Company's proprietary processes, CLEVR Process for gold extraction and Glasslock Process for arsenic stabilization, offer sustainable alternatives to traditional, more toxic extraction and storage methods, allowing for the recovery of precious and base metals while minimizing environmental impact.
